title: AI Engineer
tagline: I build LLM-powered systems — RAG pipelines, classifiers, and agent workflows — with the same engineering discipline I spent 5 years applying to production web platforms.
metaDescription: Annamalai Kathiresan — AI Engineer. LLMs, RAG pipelines, PyTorch, LangChain, and production AI applications.

about.prose: I moved into AI engineering from 5 years of production software — Angular frontends and Spring Boot backends for Tata, Comcast, and Verizon. That background is the point: I approach ML systems as software that has to ship, so API design, error handling, evaluation, and deployment get the same weight as model quality. My focus is RAG systems, NLP classifiers, and agent workflows built end to end.

learning.title: Learning log
learning.subtitle: A structured self-study path — fundamentals through production LLM systems, each step paired with hands-on code.

items.title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
items.description: Supervised/unsupervised learning, feature engineering, cross-validation, evaluation metrics.

items.title: Deep Learning & Neural Networks
items.description: Architectures, backpropagation, training loops, activation functions.

items.title: Large Language Models
items.description: GPT architecture, prompt engineering, context windows, token optimization.

items.title: Generative AI
items.description: Text generation, diffusion concepts, multimodal applications.

items.title: RAG & Embeddings
items.description: Vector search, chunking strategies, retrieval pipelines, embedding models.

items.title: Python for ML
items.description: NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn, preprocessing, EDA workflows.

items.title: PyTorch & TensorFlow
items.description: Model building, custom training loops, tensor operations.

items.title: AI Agents & Tool Use
items.description: LangChain orchestration, tool calling, multi-step agent workflows.

items.title: RAG Knowledge Assistant
items.context: Question answering over custom document collections without fine-tuning a model.
items.built: Retrieval pipeline with semantic chunking, vector embeddings, and LLM answer generation — with source attribution wired through so every answer cites the chunks it came from.
items.outcome: Accurate answers on domain-specific content with per-chunk citations; retrieval quality measured against a hand-built eval set.

items.title: Sentiment Classifier
items.context: Binary sentiment analysis on short text, built to compare classical ML against neural approaches honestly.
items.built: One preprocessing pipeline feeding both a scikit-learn baseline and a PyTorch neural classifier, evaluated on the same held-out test set.
items.outcome: Documented accuracy comparison between the two approaches, including where the simpler model wins.

items.title: LLM Agent Workflow
items.context: Multi-step task completion requiring tool calls and memory across turns.
items.built: LangChain agent with tool calling, conversation memory, structured output parsing, and fallback handling when a tool call fails mid-task.
items.outcome: Reliable multi-step execution — failed tool calls degrade gracefully instead of derailing the run.

items.title: Fine-tuning Experiment
items.context: Domain adaptation on a small custom dataset using transfer learning.
items.built: Hugging Face transformers fine-tuning pipeline with a frozen baseline, held-out evaluation, and experiment tracking across runs.
items.outcome: Measured performance lift over the zero-shot baseline on domain-specific queries.

highlights: Architect API-driven systems at Tata Communications — the same integration patterns used to put AI services into production
CI/CD and observability practices that transfer directly to ML model deployment pipelines
Built data-heavy analytics dashboards at Verizon — practical experience with large-scale data pipelines
Shipped production Angular/React apps with the reliability standards AI products need

contact.message: Open to AI engineering roles and RAG system work — especially teams that want someone who can ship the whole system, not just the notebook.
